title: Limitation
full_text:
4.3.1.2 Limitation
Limitation
1) Notwithstanding the requirements of this Section, lighting and lighting controls
shall comply with Articles 4.2.1.1. and 4.2.1.2. and Subsections 4.2.3. and 4.2.4.

sentences.text: Notwithstanding the requirements of this Section, lighting and lighting controls shall comply with Articles 4.2.1.1. and 4.2.1.2. and Subsections 4.2.3. and 4.2.4.
